capabilities_used.evidence: 核心内容几乎围绕减半节奏展开：如 [2024-04-29] “The first half is all about bouncing back, but the second? That's where the frenzy hits.”；[2024-09-30] “#bitcoin halving prices $12➡️$648➡️$8,572➡️$63,977➡️ Next Halving Estimate: March 28, 2028”。附图 3 直接用四次减半价格与 2028 第五次减半做框架。

他反复使用 4 年周期比较： [2024-05-25] “4 years ago 1 #BTC = $8,904 Today 1 #BTC = $69,032 That's a 675% increase or 67% CAGR”；[2025-03-28] “Bitcoin’s 4-year cycle won’t look the same... But measured halving to halving, one thing stays the same”。附图 7 直接比较 2012-2020 vs 2016-2024。
[2024-05-30] “Higher Highs Higher Lows #bitcoin”；[2024-04-28] “#bitcoin higher lows”。附图 8 用黑线分隔 epoch，并标注 $2→$152→$3k→$16k 的抬高低点、$32→$1,242→$20k→$69k 的抬高高点，是典型长期上升趋势框架。
虽然整体偏多，但他非常强调周期内后段的‘frenzy/mania’阶段：[2024-04-29] “the second? That's where the frenzy hits.”；[2025-01-30] “I thought $100K Bitcoin would mark the start of the mania phase.” 这是典型把后半程视为抛物线加速区的周期框架。
[2024-02-29] 线程里写到 “With surging ETF demand...”；[2024-12-23] “Only $561M this week” 明显把 ETF 资金流当作需求代理变量。
[2024-03-30] 明确发过 “#bitcoin/M2”；说明他会把 BTC 与全球流动性代理做对照，不只看价格本身。
[2026-04-11] “This year 850,000 $BTC, 60,000–70,000 dolar aralığında toplandı... toplam arzın %9’undan fazlası” 这类供应在某价格带集中、被吸收的表述，本质是在看强手持有/供应锁定。
未见他高频直接发稳定币供给图，但其宏观-流动性叙事与 ETF/资金进入框架一致，属于次要但兼容的资金面代理。证据强度较弱，因此给低权重。
没有直接 NVT 用法证据，更多是以 realized price / mayer multiple 这类估值带来框定高低估，因此只给很低权重作为近似估值框架。

[2024-06-25] “#bitcoin mayer multiple a cool 1.07”；[2024-06-18] “Despite Realized Mayer Multiple momentum turning sour in April, the price has remained surprisingly stable.” 他明显使用 Mayer/Realized Mayer Multiple，这本质与价格相对长期均线/实现价格的收复状态相关。
未见高频 DXY 图，但其宏观叙事偏流动性而非纯图形，具备宏观确认思路；不过公开证据不足，因此权重低。
[2024-01-28] “#bitcoin vs. S&P” 说明他会用风险资产对照框架来解释 BTC 所处的大类资产 regime，但不是主轴。

虽然 seed 里是 MVRV Z-score，但他更常发 realized price / realized price index / realized mayer multiple。 [2024-02-29] “Realized Price Index”; [2024-11-30] “The Bitcoin price has always revisited the realized price during bear markets.” 说明他会用链上估值周期带来定位顶部/底部。
[2024-12-30] 关于波动与货币属性的长帖；[2024-01-28] “#bitcoin drawdowns”；[2024-06-25] “#bitcoin drawdowns this cycle”。他持续量化回撤和波动，但更多用于教育和周期定位，而非短线风控执行。
[2024-10-28] “4 years ago... boosted by a wave of extreme leverage that took it past $60k. This time, we have ETFs with options.” 说明他会用杠杆结构差异解释不同周期斜率和可持续性。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Log Scale Regime Framing
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use logarithmic scale as the default lens for Bitcoin history to normalize percentage moves, avoid anchoring to nominal price, and compare cycles across orders of magnitude.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 默认用对数坐标观察比特币历史，把不同数量级的涨跌放到统一百分比尺度上，避免被名义价格锚定，并用于跨周期比较。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-05-26] “Is it even possible to make sense of the #bitcoin price history without grasping log scale?”；[2024-09-25] “Linear scale is for amateurs. Step up your game by using log scale.”；附图 1 同时对比 log 与 linear。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: On-This-Date Cross-Cycle Analog
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Compare Bitcoin's price, CAGR, or position in the cycle against the exact same calendar date 4/8/12 years ago to infer cycle progress and expected path.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把当前日期与 4/8/12 年前同一天对照，比较价格、CAGR 和周期位置，用于估算当前所处阶段和潜在路径。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Realized Price Gravity
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treat realized price and its derived ratios as a long-cycle valuation anchor; price tends to gravitate back toward it in bears, while extended premiums define bull-cycle heat.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把实现价格及其衍生比率视为长期估值锚；熊市价格有回归实现价格的倾向，牛市中对实现价格的高溢价则定义市场过热程度。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-02-29] “Realized Price Index”; [2024-11-30] “The Bitcoin price has always revisited the realized price during bear markets.”；[2024-06-18] “Realized Mayer Multiple momentum turning sour...”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Price Range Residency
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Measure how many days Bitcoin spends in each price band to infer maturity, acceptance, and the probability of eventual migration into the next magnitude band.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 统计比特币在各价格区间停留的天数，用于判断成熟度、价值接受度，以及向下一数量级价格区间迁移的概率。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-01-26] “Days Bitcoin has spent in price ranges...”；[2025-03-29]/[2025-05-23]/[2025-08-30] 多次重复这个统计框架。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Sats Per Dollar Compression
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track how many satoshis one dollar buys over successive halvings or years as an adoption/compression narrative for long-term upside framing.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 跟踪每 1 美元能买到多少 satoshis，观察其在减半和跨年尺度上的压缩，用作采用率提升和长期上涨叙事工具。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-04-26] “At #bitcoin's first halving, a dollar snagged you 8M sats... Now, we're down to just 1,600 sats per dollar.”；[2024-03-30] “1427 sats/$”；[2024-01-28] “2364 sats/$”。

personal_quirks.quote: Linear scale is for amateurs. Step up your game by using  log scale.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 分析 BTC 长周期必须优先使用对数坐标，否则会被名义价格变化误导。

personal_quirks.quote: Remind the family to zoom out this Christmas
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 遇到短期噪音或情绪波动时，先拉长时间尺度，再做判断。

personal_quirks.quote: History doesn't repeat itself, but it often rhymes
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 不机械复制旧周期，但会用历史相似结构做情景推演。

personal_quirks.quote: The first half is all about bouncing back, but the second? That's where the frenzy hits.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 减半后前半段偏修复，后半段才是主升和情绪狂热区。

personal_quirks.quote: It’s a marathon, not a sprint. Those who wait, win. #Bitcoin
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 持有周期胜过频繁交易，耐心比短线节奏更重要。

unique_traits: 他不是典型做短线图形交易的 TA，更像“比特币周期可视化研究员”：用减半、4 年周期、同日对照、CAGR、对数坐标把复杂行情压缩成可传播的长期框架。和一般 TA 不同，他极少讨论具体入场止损，而是不断用数据图像强化一个核心偏见：BTC 的长期结构性上升仍在延续。其风格兼具内容创作属性，图表高度标准化、叙事性强、非常适合建立长期 bullish positioning。

high_conviction_phrases: I'm calling it: next #bitcoin halving, six figures!
Bitcoin is much closer to $1M than most people realize.
low_conviction_phrases: How long will the pattern hold?
Can you find the current cycle?
